zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Clermont capet於1257年1月15日出生時，他的父親St. Louis IX roi de France42歲，母親Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia36歲。他於大約1276年7月與Béatrice de BOURGOGNE在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年3月3日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年60歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Clermont capet于1257年1月15日出生时，他的父亲St. Louis IX roi de France42岁，母亲Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia36岁。他于大约1276年7月与Béatrice de BOURGOGNE在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1317年3月3日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年60岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Clermont capet was born on 15 January 1257, his father, St. Louis IX roi de France, was 42 and his mother, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, was 36. He married Béatrice de BOURGOGNE about July 1276, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 March 1317, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Clermont capet est né le 15 janvier 1257, son père, St. Louis IX roi de France, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice de BOURGOGNE environ juillet 1276, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1317, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Clermont capet am 15. Januar 1257 geboren wurde, war sein Vater St. Louis IX roi de France 42 und seine Mutter Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia 36. Er hat um Juli 1276 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Béatrice de BOURGOGNE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. März 1317 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Béatrice de BOURGOGNE circa luglio 1276, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Clermont capetが1257年1月15日に生まれた時，父St. Louis IX roi de Franceは42歳，母Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Franciaは36歳であった。約1276年7月にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドでBéatrice de BOURGOGNEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年3月3日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで60歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Clermont capet(이)가 1257년 1월 15일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 St. Louis IX roi de France(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1276년 7월 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 Béatrice de BOURGOGNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 3월 3일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Clermont capet nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1257, seu pai, St. Louis IX roi de France, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice de BOURGOGNE aproximadamente julho de 1276, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Clermont capet родился 15 января 1257 г., его отцу по имени St. Louis IX roi de France было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice de BOURGOGNE около июль 1276 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 марта 1317 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.
